nasb.text: Now it came about as I prophesied, that Pelatiah son of Benaiah died. Then I fell on my face and cried out with a loud voice and said, “Alas, Lord God! Will You bring the remnant of Israel to a complete end?”

esv.text: And it came to pass, while I was prophesying, that Pelatiah the son of Benaiah died. Then I fell down on my face and cried out with a loud voice and said, “Ah, Lord God! Will you make a full end of the remnant of Israel?”

cnv.text: 我正在說預言的時候，比拿雅的兒子毘拉提死了。於是我臉伏在地，大聲呼叫，說：“哎，主耶和華啊！難道你要把以色列餘剩的人都盡行毀滅嗎？”

ccb.text: 我正在说预言的时候，比拿雅的儿子毗拉提就死了。我便俯伏在地大喊：“唉，主耶和华啊，你要灭绝以色列的余民吗？”
